# tanvex

> TanStack Start + Convex + Better Auth starter on the latest majors. SSR auth, email OTP, user profiles, rate limiting, one-command setup. Vite 8 Rolldown+Oxc, Tailwind v4 + shadcn base-luma on Base UI, Oxlint + Oxfmt.

## Stack

- TanStack Start + TanStack Router (file-based routing, SSR via Nitro 3)
- Convex 1.34 backend with `@convex-dev/better-auth`, `@convex-dev/rate-limiter`, `@convex-dev/resend`
- Better Auth 1.6.5 with the `emailOTP` and `username` plugins
- Vite 8 (Rolldown bundler, Oxc toolchain)
- React 19 with the automatic JSX transform
- TypeScript 6, strict + verbatimModuleSyntax
- Tailwind CSS v4 via @tailwindcss/vite
- shadcn/ui base-luma theme on @base-ui/react primitives
- HugeIcons + Geist Variable font
- Oxlint 1.59 (232 rules, 8 plugins, type-aware via oxlint-tsgolint)
- Oxfmt (native import + Tailwind + package.json sorting)
- Vitest 4 + @testing-library/react + jsdom
- Zod v4 on the client, Convex validators on the backend
- Sonner toasts, theme provider with no-flash script, web vitals reporter
- Bun as runtime and package manager

## Auth

Email + password and username + password sign-in. Email verification via OTP through Better Auth's `emailOTP` plugin, delivered by Resend. Password reset and email change both use OTP. Sessions last 7 days with a 10-minute `freshAge` window for sensitive ops. Rate limits on `/sign-in/*`, `/sign-up/*`, `/email-otp/*`, and session endpoints. SSR auth resolves the token server-side via `createServerFn` and hands off to the client on hydrate.

## Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/ramonclaudio/tanvex
- License: MIT
- Install: `bunx degit ramonclaudio/tanvex my-app`

## Key files

- `convex/auth.ts`: Better Auth config, user helpers
- `convex/http.ts`: HTTP router with CORS + rate-limited public endpoints
- `convex/email.ts`: Resend helpers + OTP templates
- `convex/rateLimit.ts`: token-bucket limiter config
- `convex/schema.ts`: users table (identity merged from Better Auth)
- `src/routes/__root.tsx`: root layout, head, theme, Toaster, skip link
- `src/routes/sign-in.tsx`: auth UI (signin, signup, OTP, password reset)
- `src/routes/_authed/profile.tsx`: profile editor with avatar upload and change-password
- `src/lib/auth-client.ts` / `auth-server.ts`: Better Auth clients
- `src/lib/site.ts`: SITE_URL, SITE_NAME, SITE_TITLE, SITE_DESCRIPTION
- `src/lib/seo.ts`: head meta helper (og, twitter, canonical, json-ld)
- `src/components/theme-provider.tsx`: light/dark/system with no-flash script
- `src/styles.css`: Tailwind v4 + base-luma + reduced-motion
- `scripts/setup.ts`: one-command setup (wipe, install, Convex + Better Auth + Resend)

## Conventions

- Client-exposed env vars must be prefixed VITE_. Server-only go bare (on the Convex deployment).
- Server secrets (SITE_URL, BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, RESEND_API_KEY, EMAIL_FROM, APP_NAME) live on the Convex deployment, not in `.env.local`.
- shadcn style pinned to base-luma in components.json.
- TypeScript strict; prefer early returns, small functions, no deep nesting.
- Conventional commits. Oxlint + Oxfmt handle lint + format.
